articles.title: ‘Trevor Noah: Joy in the Trenches’ review: Noah asks the tough questions, but makes you laugh anyway
articles.description: “Who will you be when history calls?” asks Trevor Noah in his latest Netflix special 'Joy in the Trenches'

articles.title: Perfect Crown episodes 5-6 OTT release in India: When and where to watch IU and Byeon Woo-seok’s most-watched romantic Korean series? Plot, cast and more
articles.description: Perfect Crown, a new K-drama, is grabbing audiences' attention worldwide. Starring IU and Byeon Woo-seok, the series brings romance and royalty in a modern setting. New episodes are released weekly, with the finale scheduled for May 16. Fans are eagerly anticipating the upcoming episodes. Read on!

articles.title: Arshad Warsi: ‘My children will not face pressure like star kids of Shah Rukh Khan or Hrithik Roshan’
articles.description: Arshad Warsi’s son Zeke Warsi has begun his journey in the film industry as an assistant director with filmmakers like Siddharth Anand and Rajkumar Hirani, while his 18-year-old daughter Zene Zoe Warsi is still studying.

articles.title: 'AI will replace Timothée Chalamet, but not dancer on stage': Charlize Theron slams actor's 'reckless comment' on ballet
articles.description: Charlize Theron called Timothee Chalamet's comments on ballet and opera from earlier in the year ‘reckless’ in a new interview.

articles.title: Bhooth Bangla box office Day 2: Film Races Past Rs 60 Crore Worldwide, Big Saturday Boost
articles.description: Bhooth Bangla, starring Akshay Kumar, had a solid second day, grossing Rs 60.50 crore globally and increasing by more than 55% from the first day.

articles.title: Justin Theroux and Nicole Brydon Bloom welcome first child, a baby boy
articles.description: Justin Theroux and Nicole Brydon Bloom have welcomed their first child, stepping into parenthood with a baby boy. The couple shared the heartfelt news with a quiet, intimate glimpse into their new life as a family.

articles.title: 'He Was Earning In Bollywood': Om Shanti Om Actor Slammed For Dhurandhar-Inspired Role In Pakistani Drama
articles.description: Om Shanti Om, Tamasha and Namastey London actor Javed Sheikh faces backlash after Pakistani show clips go viral online.

articles.title: 'Naagin 7' 18th April written update: Radhika frames Ahana as dark secrets and deadly trap unfold
articles.description: A woman’s last request spirals into a thrilling web of deceit and vengeance as she battles a lethal illness. With a chilling twist, she devises a cunning plan to implicate another in murder, donning a supernatural mask. As the layers of deception peel away, long-buried secrets come to light, igniting a frantic fight for survival against lurking adversaries.

articles.title: Gaurav Gera says Dhurandhar's success improved his self-worth, talks about his love life: ‘I’m getting more respect'
articles.description: Gaurav Gera revealed he got more respect after Dhurandhar's success and talked about not wanting to be in love with someone again.

articles.title: Viral Video: Woman Slaps Ice Spice At LA Restaurant, Rapper To Take Legal Action
articles.description: Her latest release was Thootie with TOKISCHA in December last year.

articles.title: ‘Fungus and Iron’ manga to end with volume 10 as anime adaptation nears
articles.description: Ayaka Katayama's acclaimed dystopian manga 'Fungus and Iron' is set to conclude with its 10th collected volume. The series, which began serialization in March 2021, has captivated readers with its blend of dark sci-fi and character drama. An anime adaptation was also recently announced, further increasing anticipation for the manga's finale.

articles.title: Nadia Farès passes away at 57
articles.description: The film industry mourns the loss of Nadia Farès, the cherished French actress who passed away at 57 after a tragic week-long coma triggered by cardiac arrest. Celebrated for her role in 'The Crimson River,' she had previously opened up about her health challenges, notably a brain aneurysm and heart surgeries.

articles.title: Gemini ♊️ Weekly Horoscope (20th April - 26th April 2026): Networking, Career Moves & Financial Growth Ahead
articles.description: Gemini Weekly Horoscope (20th April 2026 to 26th April 2026): This gemini weekly horoscope focuses on expansion, communication, and social networking as the Moon moves through key sectors of your chart. With Jupiter in your sign, you feel a sense of abundance, though you must navigate some mental fog because of your ruling planet's position. The Moon will transit from the Taurus sign, Gemini sign, Cancer sign, and Leo sign during the week. It is a period for sharing ideas and strengthening your community bonds. Discover what Anand Sagar Pathak of Astropatri reveals in this gemini horoscope this week, offering valuable weekly astrology predictions for gemini designed to enhance adaptability, emotional intelligence, and consistent growth within this weekly horoscope cycle.

You will feel a strong desire to take the lead in all areas of life. The Moon will transit from the Taurus sign, Gemini sign, Cancer sign, and Leo sign during the week, which can help you embrace your natural courage while remaining mindful of your financial stability and communication style. Explore what Anand Sagar Pathak of Astropatri predicts in this aries horoscope this week, offering insights into balance, strategy, and resilience as revealed through weekly astrology predictions for aries and this detailed weekly horoscope outlook.

articles.title: 'Dhurandhar 2' box office collection day 31: Ranveer Singh’s film mints close to Rs 1,750 crore worldwide
articles.description: Ranveer Singh's 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge' is defying expectations, crossing Rs 1,750 crore worldwide. Despite a slow start to its fifth week and competition from 'Bhoot Bangla', the film saw a significant surge on its fifth Saturday. Its India net collection has now surpassed Rs 1,110 crore, making it a major box office success.
